---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new attack, defense, model, or dashboard component
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary
A short one-sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve, or what result does it improve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the approach you have in mind. Include pseudocode or references if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out?

## Affected Components
Check all that apply:

- [ ] Data infrastructure (`src/data_infrastructure.py`)
- [ ] Attack library (`src/attacks/`)
- [ ] Detection models (`src/models/`)
- [ ] Conformal defense (`src/conformal/`)
- [ ] Explainability (`src/explainability/`)
- [ ] Drift detection (`src/drift/`)
- [ ] MLOps / experiment tracking (`src/mlops/`)
- [ ] API / WebSocket (`src/api/`)
- [ ] SOC Dashboard (`dashboard/`)
- [ ] CI/CD (`.github/workflows/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)

## References
Papers, repos, or issues that support this request.
